title: selaginella breynioides
intro: Selaginella breynioides, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella breynioides include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
